sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Reactive Shield
feat.text: You can snap your shield into place just as you would take a blow, avoiding the hit at the last second. You immediately use the Raise a Shield action and gain your shield’s bonus to AC. The circumstance bonus from the shield applies to your AC when you’re determining the outcome of the triggering attack.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

archetype.name: Viking
archetype.note: This archetype offers Reactive Shield at a different level than displayed here.

feat.trigger: An enemy hits you with a melee Strike
